posts.author: sahilgoel1606
posts.community: Goldiam International : A rare shareholder friendly and debt free Jewelry company
posts.text: The dual casting method adopted to bypass tarrifs has made the company emerge stronger both in terms of bottom line and top line (as smaller player loose market share) ORIGEM has real advantage of better designs and better real estate (Malls vs High streets). Management is very mindful of not piling up losses and building it in a balanced way. FY27 target to close at 7 Cr per month or 85 Cr ARR. This would place them in top 5 players for sure . The B2C business will mostly be valued at better multiples Recently invested
